description: Fragment of a letter from Avraham b. Natan Av (identification on the basis of handwriting), Tyre, to Yehuda ha-Kohen ha-Rav ve-Rosh ha-Seder b. Yosef regarding opposition to the writer and his resultant inability to carry out his communal tasks as judge. Information from FGP.
description_he: שבר מכתב מאברהם בן נתן אב, צור, ליהודה הכהן הרב וראש הסדר, על התנגדות למכותב ועיכוב מלאכתו כשופט.
